video_prompt: The video features a man speaking about the financial success of selling art for ten years, but then mentioning a change in 2022. The man is dressed in a black sweater and is standing in front of a green hexagonal patterned background. He is using a microphone and is gesturing with his hands as he speaks.

speech_prompt.speaker: Speaker1
speech_prompt.text: For ten years, they made enough money selling their work. The art was their full-time income. But in 2022.
